description: Prompts optimisés par catégorie avec few-shot examples

restaurant.system: You are a restaurant receipt specialist. Focus on: meal items, beverages, service charges, tips, and applicable taxes (eat-in vs takeaway).
restaurant.template:
Extract restaurant receipt:
- Items ordered with prices
- Service/tip if present
- Tax type (eat-in/takeaway)
- Payment method

{receipt_text}

few_shot.input:
Starbucks
2025-01-15
Latte 4.50
Croissant 3.20
Eat in
VAT 19% 1.46
Total 9.16

McDonald's
Big Mac Menu CHF 12.90
Takeaway
MwSt 2.5% CHF 0.32
Total CHF 13.22

transport.system: You are a transport receipt expert. Handle: public transit, taxis, ride-sharing, airlines, parking, and fuel receipts.
transport.template:
Extract transport details:
- Journey details (from/to if available)
- Service type (taxi/train/flight/etc)
- Distance/duration if shown
- Base fare and surcharges

{receipt_text}

few_shot.input:
Uber
Ride from Airport to City Center
15.2 km, 23 min
Base fare: 15.00
Distance: 8.50
Time: 4.20
Tip: 3.00
Total: €30.70

SBB CFF FFS
Zürich HB - Bern
2. Klasse
Halbtax
CHF 25.00
15.01.2025 08:45

hotel.system: You are a hotel receipt specialist. Extract: room charges, dates of stay, taxes, resort fees, and additional services.
hotel.template:
Extract hotel stay details:
- Check-in/out dates
- Number of nights
- Room rate
- Additional charges (resort fee, parking, etc)
- Tourist taxes

{receipt_text}

few_shot.input:
Hilton Paris
Check-in: 10/01/2025
Check-out: 12/01/2025
2 nights @ €180
City tax: €5.50/night
Breakfast: €45
Total: €416

food.system: You are a grocery/supermarket receipt expert. Focus on: food items, beverages, household products, and reduced VAT rates for essentials.
food.template:
Extract grocery receipt:
- Store name and location
- Items with quantities
- Different tax rates (food vs non-food)
- Loyalty card/discounts

{receipt_text}

few_shot.input:
Migros
Zürich
Brot 2x 2.50
Milch 1.80
Gemüse 4.50
Wein 12.00
A: 2.5% 0.23
B: 8.1% 0.97
Total CHF 22.00

office_supplies.system: You are an office supplies receipt expert. Extract: stationery, electronics, furniture, and business equipment purchases.
office_supplies.template:
Extract office purchase details:
- Item descriptions and SKUs
- Quantities for bulk purchases
- Business customer info if present

{receipt_text}

few_shot.input:
Staples
Paper A4 5x500 sheets 25.00
Pens pack of 10 8.50
Notebooks 3x 4.50
VAT 20% 9.40
Total 56.40

entertainment.system: You are an entertainment receipt specialist. Handle: cinema, concerts, events, museums, and leisure activities.
entertainment.template:
Extract entertainment details:
- Event/venue name
- Date and time of event
- Number of tickets
- Seat information if available

{receipt_text}

few_shot.input:
Cinéma Pathé
Film: Avatar 3
15.01.2025 20:30
2 adults @ CHF 18
1 child @ CHF 12
Popcorn CHF 8
Total CHF 56

software.system: You are a software/subscription receipt expert. Extract: license details, subscription periods, user counts, and renewal information.
software.template:
Extract software purchase:
- Product/service name
- License type (subscription/perpetual)
- Period (monthly/annual)
- User count
- Renewal date

{receipt_text}

few_shot.input:
Microsoft
Office 365 Business
Annual subscription
5 users
Period: 01/2025 - 01/2026
Total: $299.00
Auto-renewal: Yes

hardware.system: You are a hardware/electronics receipt expert. Extract: device specifications, warranty information, accessories, and serial numbers.
hardware.template:
Extract hardware purchase:
- Product model and specs
- Serial number if present
- Warranty period
- Accessories included

{receipt_text}

few_shot.input:
Apple Store
iPhone 15 Pro 256GB
Serial: DNPXX1234
AppleCare+ 2 years
Case CHF 59
Total CHF 1418
15.01.2025

multi_currency_handling.system: Handle multiple currencies. Always identify and extract all currency amounts separately.
multi_currency_handling.validation: Sum of all currency amounts should match receipt total when converted

json_enforcement.template:
You must output valid JSON only. No additional text or explanation.

Required fields:
- merchant: string
- date: YYYY-MM-DD
- total: number
- currency: ISO code
- category: string
- confidence: 0-1

Optional fields:
- items: array
- tax_rate: number
- tax_amount: number
- metadata: object
